stemHtml: Unable to establish radio contact with an aeronautical station. What must the pilot do?

options.a: Squawk 7500 and land at the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.b: Check radio equipment and make a test transmission.
options.c: Attempt communication with other aircraft or other aeronautical stations.
options.d: Squawk 7600 and proceed to the destination per the flight plan.
